summary: T&C Modal flow testing - PASS. Backend 8/8 tests passed. Frontend modal appears correctly after login when consent is not given. Full flow verified: login -> modal appears -> accept -> navigate to tabs.

issues: Modal header is missing the shield icon (FontAwesome5 'shield-alt') in the screenshot - may be loading delay

critical_code_review_comments: The T&C consent flow is correctly implemented
Frontend checks consent on Home tab load via api.getConsentStatus()
TermsModal component renders with all required information (GDPR terms, privacy info, accept button)
After accepting, user can navigate to all tabs (Home, Bibbia, Diario, Profilo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: T&C consent flow is working. The modal appears correctly after login if user hasn't accepted terms. Endpoints: GET /api/consent/status (returns {accepted: bool}), POST /api/consent/accept?version=X, DELETE /api/consent/withdraw. The consent check is in (tabs)/index.tsx using consentCheckedRef to prevent repeated checks.

modal_appears_after_login.details: When consent is not given, modal appears showing 'Termini e Condizioni'

accept_button_works.details: Clicking 'Accetto i Termini e Condizioni' calls API and dismisses modal

navigation_after_accept.details: After accepting, user can see and navigate to all tabs
